name: chfindustries.com
message:
Household Goods.

“Family-run since 2002, CHF is, at its heart, a community of people with a shared passion for enhancing home life. The company weaves that perspective into every aspect of business, from encouraging work-life balance for employees to creating workplace initiatives and charitable giving programs to help foster responsible working conditions, fair compensation, respect for human rights, and environmental stewardship.”
